text:

> Maintainer of emulators/zsnes,
>

>

> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/131179

This patch is acceptable, please commit it.

Thanks,
Naram Qashat
